title: Flow transcriptome of human aortic endothelial cells
author: Wu, David
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Human aortic endothelial cells which were subjected to unidirectional or disturbed flow for 24 hours followed by total RNA sequencing
